data.title: Diwali at Times Square will celebrate its 10th anniversary on Oct. 12, 2025, in partnership with San Francisco and Toronto.
data.description: The annual Diwali festival at Times Square will be back on October 12, 2025, marking its 10th anniversary at the iconic venue in New York City. The event will also involve San Francisco, California, and Toronto, Canada this year, representing a collaboration between major cities. This celebration at the largest hub in the world is expected to attract a significant audience and participants to partake in the cultural festivities and showcases.

data.title: ManpowerGroup releases 2024-2025 Sustainability Report focusing on a people-first transition, highlighting progress across their sustainability pillars.
data.description: In Milwaukee on September 18, 2025, ManpowerGroup unveiled its latest 2024-2025 Sustainability Report titled "Working to Change the World: A Human-First, Just Transition." This marks the fifth year of the report, showcasing advancements in ManpowerGroup's sustainability focus areas, including Planet, People, and Prosperity.

data.title: Lush Cosmetics launches Café Gourmand in NYC west village on Sept 19, running from 10am-6pm, at 62 Bedford Street.
data.description: This weekend, customers are welcome to enjoy Lush Cosmetics' popular gourmand product collection at Café Gourmand, a temporary café in New York City's West Village. Situated at 62 Bedford Street, the café will operate from 10 AM to 6 PM on September 20 and 21, 2025.

data.title: Artistic Milliners buys majority of Cone Denim, forming a global entity. Acquired from Elevate Textiles.
data.description: Artistic Milliners, a renown denim innovator, has acquired a controlling interest in Cone Denim from Elevate Textiles, a move that will establish a new global entity under the revered Cone Denim brand name. The deal was finalized on September 18, 2025, marking a significant milestone for both companies. This acquisition will strengthen Artistic Milliners' position in the industry and solidify their global reach. The precise financial details of the transaction were not disclosed, but it represents a major strategic shift, as Cone Denim is a well-known player in the market, with operations spanning the globe. This development underscores the dynamic nature of the denim sector, with Artistic Milliners poised to leverage Cone Denim's heritage and expertise to further enhance their presence worldwide.

data.title: LendOS secures Series A funding led by Blackstone Innovations Investments, enhancing corporate debt process, expanding customer base.
data.description: LendOS, a cutting-edge platform designed for managing corporate debt, with a focus on private credit and syndicated loans, has introduced a next-generation model. The new platform aims to streamline operations related to the entire private credit lifecycle. As of September 18, 2025, the company revealed that it has secured fresh capital to support its future plans and to broaden its customer base. This innovative fintech startup is based in New York and is set to reshape the landscape of corporate debt management.

data.title: Jeff Hughes appointed to Genstar's Advisory Board to advise on software investments for portfolio growth. Sept. 18, 2025.
data.description: A prominent figure in the SaaS industry will provide guidance on Genstar's software investments to drive growth in portfolio companies. The announcement was made in San Francisco on September 18, 2025. Genstar Capital, a top private equity firm specializing in software and financial services investments, aims to leverage this partnership to accelerate the growth of its portfolio companies.

data.title: PCNA surpasses key sustainability targets in 2024 report, showing progress in energy, emissions, waste, and community impact.
data.description: Promotional products supplier PCNA based in Pittsburgh revealed their success in integrating sustainability initiatives into their business operations. They have made significant advancements in reducing energy consumption, cutting emissions, managing waste effectively, and positively impacting the community. This achievement marks measurable progress as of September 18, 2025. PCNA's efforts underline their commitment to enhancing sustainability practices in their industry.

data.title: SK Networks hosted "AI WAVE 2025", connecting AI startups and investors. Key AI companies like Upstage and PhnyX Lab were showcased.
data.description: With a focus on "Pitch the Future and Connect the Dots," a recent event united top AI startups and investors. Notable highlights included SK Networks' display of its key AI portfolio firms, such as Upstage and PhnyX Lab. Additionally, a panel session delved into discussing the outlook of Sovereign AI at the event, which spotlighted the latest trends in the AI sector.

data.title: 2026 Mazda CX-30 introduces Aire Editions with black emblems, 10.25-inch display, starting at $25,975 MSRP.
data.description: A new Aire Editions model has been introduced to the lineup, featuring unique black emblems. Select 2.5 S models now come with a larger 10.25-inch center display that includes touchscreen capabilities for Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. The 2026 CX-30 is now available with a starting MSRP of $25,975. The announcement was made in Irvine, California on September 18, 2025.

data.title: Ramaco Resources releases documents on Brook Mine Rare Earth Project, shares details at ramacoresources.com.
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky on September 18, 2025, Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC, METCB) has disclosed that it released a shareholder letter today. The letter can be accessed on the company's website, www.ramacoresources.com. The communication includes updates from the Chairman pertaining to recent developments within the company.

data.title: NVIDIA and Intel team up for AI and computing development, with NVIDIA investing $5 billion in Intel stock for innovation.
data.description: NVIDIA and Intel have revealed a joint effort to create AI infrastructure and personal computing products. This partnership involves NVIDIA injecting $5 billion into Intel stock, aimed at boosting technological progress in the field.

data.title: Ripple's XRP jumps 3.95% to $3.13, eyes $3.38 resistance. Bullish trend expected to continue for potential breakout.
data.description: The value of XRP has surged to $3.13 driven by significant bullish momentum, with technical indicators suggesting a possible breakthrough above crucial resistance thresholds in upcoming trading sessions.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market rallies after Fed rate cut, with Bitcoin hitting $117,201.67, Ethereum $4,581.02, XRP $3.13, Dogecoin $0.2804. Over $400.85 million liquidated, $51.3 million outflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs. Bitcoin at $120,000 target, possible rejection.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets experienced a surge on Thursday following the expected 25-basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve, boosting risk appetite for digital assets. Prices at a glance: Bitcoin (BTC) reached $117,201.67, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,581.02, Solana (SOL) at $246.71, XRP at $3.13, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2804, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001334. In the last 24 hours, Coinglass data revealed that 107,269 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses totaling $400.85 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicated net outflows of $51.3 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $1.9 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Wednesday. As per Crypto Caeser, Bitcoin surpassing $117,000 signifies a potential breakout towards $120,000, but facing rejection could lead to a different trajectory. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cizzle Brands introduces CWENCH Hydration™ in 149 Loblaws, Zehrs, and Real Canadian/Atlantic Superstore locations.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has shared that CWENCH Hydration™ products are now available in key stores owned by Loblaw Companies Limited (“LCL”) such as Loblaws, Zehrs, Your Independent Grocer, Real Canadian Superstore, and Atlantic Superstore. This expansion means that CWENCH Hydration™ can now be found in 149 locations across these popular banners. The flavors on offer include Blue Raspberry, Tropical Flow, and Rainbow.

data.title: Sprott Inc. adjusts index tracked by SGDJ ETF due to high gold miner returns; Solactive Junior Gold Miners Custom Factors Index up 90% YTD, causing $2B market cap ceiling issue.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, Sprott Asset Management USA, Inc., a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., announced a minor adjustment to the index tracked by the Sprott Junior Gold Miners ETF (NYSE Arca: SGDJ). Year-to-date, as of September 16, 2025, gold miners, represented by the Solactive Junior Gold Miners Custom Factors Index, have shown impressive returns of over 90%. This significant growth has pushed the market capitalization of index constituents higher, with many junior gold miners surpassing the $2 billion market cap limit specified in Section 2.1 of the index methodology. In response, Solactive AG made a one-time alteration to the index guideline to maintain the index's weighting methodology integrity. This adjustment specifically impacts the security-level market capitalization requirement stated in Section 2.1 of the index methodology.

data.title: BNB price exceeds $990, hitting 52-week high at $992.81 with 4.05% gains. However, caution advised due to RSI at 76.42. Resistance near $1,006.88.
data.description: The Binance Coin has surged to a new 52-week high of $992.81, marking a daily increase of 4.05%. However, traders are advised to be cautious as the BNB Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 76.42, indicating a potential overbought condition. The upcoming resistance level is at $1,006.88, signaling a possible barrier for further gains.

data.title: N2OFF reports success with solar & energy storage projects in Germany, Italy, & Poland through partnership with Solterra. Transition to clean energy.
data.description: Neve Yarak, Israel - September 18, 2025 - N2OFF, Inc. (NASDAQ: NITO), a cleantech company focusing on solar energy assets with the RTB model, revealed substantial advancements in its solar and energy storage ventures. The Company marked successful completion of vital projects in Germany, Italy, and Poland, as part of its collaboration with Solterra Renewable Energy Ltd. N2OFF is pushing forward a strong portfolio of renewable energy endeavors in partnership with Solterra, showcasing dedication to propelling the worldwide clean energy shift.
